    [38;5;246mShaking[39m

[38;5;239m[48;5;237m❯ [38;5;231m프로젝트 코드 분석해봐.            [39m[49m
[38;5;231m[48;5;237m  개선포인트를 찾고 하나씩 진행하자. [39m[49m

[38;5;231m●[39m Shaking/Tree Shaking 관련 TODO를
  분석하겠습니다. 먼저 핵심 파일들을
  확인하겠습니다.

  [38;5;246m(ctrl+o to expand)[39m

[38;5;75m●[39m Read [1m1[0m file [38;5;246m(ctrl+o to expand)[39m

[38;5;239m[48;5;237m❯ [38;5;231mclean architecture, single         [39m[49m
[38;5;231m[48;5;237m  responsibility principle,          [39m[49m
[38;5;231m[48;5;237m  interface-oriented programming     [39m[49m
[38;5;231m[48;5;237m  관점에서 구조를 분석하고 어긋난    [39m[49m
[38;5;231m[48;5;237m  부분을 개선하자.                   [39m[49m

[38;5;231m●[39m 사용자의 새 요청에 따라 [1mClean [0m
  [1mArchitecture, SRP, Interface-Oriented [0m
  [1mProgramming[0m 관점에서 구조를
  분석하겠습니다.

[38;5;246m [39m [1mExplore[0m(Analyze architecture
         principles)
  ⎿ [38;5;239m[48;5;237m❯ [38;5;231mAnalyze this R8/D8 codebase from
[39m[49m    [1mSearch[0m(pattern: "**/*.java")

     [38;5;246mctrl+b ctrl+b (twice) to run in [39m
     [38;5;246mbackground[39m

[38;5;215m✢[39m [38;5;222mMeandering…[38;5;215m [38;5;246m(8m 6s · ↓[39m [38;5;246m4.2k tokens)[39m
